name: [P2][Regression] TC-CHK-04: Checkout nhiều sản phẩm, địa chỉ giao hàng khác nhau, thanh toán COD
description:
Verify positive checkout & payment scenarios:
  1. Login successfully.
  2. Add product(s) to cart.
  3. Proceed to checkout page.
  4. Fill shipping information.
  5. Select payment method.
  6. Confirm the order.
  7. Assert order confirmation is displayed.
descriptionHtml:
Verify positive checkout & payment scenarios:

  1. Login successfully.
  2. Add product(s) to cart.
  3. Proceed to checkout page.
  4. Fill shipping information.
  5. Select payment method.
  6. Confirm the order.
  7. Assert order confirmation is displayed.
